scripts.predev: npm run generate:bundled-apps && npm run build:packages
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:packages" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:packages: concurrently "npm run build:watch -w @citadel/platform" "npm run build:watch -w @citadel/app-chat" "npm run build:watch -w @citadel/app-chess" "npm run build:watch -w @citadel/app-snake"
scripts.prestart: npm run generate:bundled-apps && npm run build:packages
scripts.build: npm run generate:bundled-apps && npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck && npm run build:client
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:platform && npm run build:apps
scripts.build:apps: npm run build -w @citadel/app-chat && npm run build -w @citadel/app-chess && npm run build -w @citadel/app-snake
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:server && npm run typecheck:packages
scripts.pretest: npm run generate:bundled-apps && npm run build:packages
scripts.test:production: npm run build && vitest run tests/server/production.test.ts
